In [3]:
from IPython.display import HTML, display

cover_page = """
<div style="
    width:100%;
    height:320px;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5B6EE1,#7E57C2,#F06292);
    border:5px solid white;
    border-radius:20px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
    font-family:Arial, sans-serif;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
">

    <!-- Top Left -->
    <div style="
        position:absolute;
        top:20px;
        left:35px;
        font-size:20px;
        font-weight:bold;
        color:#FFE66D;
        letter-spacing:3px;">
        🚀 PYTHON PROJECT 🚀
    </div>

    <!-- Main Title -->
    <div style="
        position:absolute;
        top:70px;
        left:50%;
        transform:translateX(-50%);
        text-align:center;">

        <div style="
            font-size:65px;
            font-weight:bold;
            color:white;
            text-shadow:3px 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);">
            🌐 Web Scraping 🌐
        </div>

        <div style="
            width:240px;
            height:5px;
            background:white;
            margin:12px auto;
            border-radius:10px;">
        </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Bottom Left -->
    <div style="
        position:absolute;
        bottom:35px;
        left:35px;
        font-size:30px;
        font-weight:bold;
        color:#FFD700;">
        ✨ Shagun Kamboj ✨
    </div>

    <!-- Bottom Right -->
    <div style="
        position:absolute;
        bottom:35px;
        right:35px;
        font-size:18px;
        color:white;
        text-align:right;
        line-height:1.8;">
        📚 Data Collection<br>
        🐍 Python<br>
        🌍 BeautifulSoup
    </div>

</div>
"""

display(HTML(cover_page))
🚀 PYTHON PROJECT 🚀
🌐 Web Scraping 🌐
✨ Shagun Kamboj ✨
📚 Data Collection
🐍 Python
🌍 BeautifulSoup
In [2]:
from IPython.display import HTML, display

display(HTML("""
<div style="
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f4f7f6,#eff5f9);
    border:3px solid #b0cddb;
    border-radius:18px;
    padding:20px;
    margin:20px 0;
    box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
">

<h1 style="
    color:#1e3a5f;
    font-family:Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;
    font-size:42px;
    margin:0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: centre
    gap: 15px;">
🏫 Website Name : 


<span style="
    font-size:30px;
    font-weight:bold;
    color:#4a3b68;
    margin-top:10px;
    font-family:Georgia;">
      🌐 Collegedunia.com
  </span>
</h1>

<hr style="
    border:none;
    height:4px;
    background:linear-gradient(to right,#ff69b4,#7b68ee,#00bcd4);
    border-radius:10px;">

<div style="
    margin-top:20px;
    padding:18px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff8e1,#e3f2fd);
    border-left:8px solid #3f51b5;
    border-radius:15px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
">

<h2 style="
    color:#1a237e;
    font-size:30px;
    font-family:Verdana,sans-serif;
    margin:0;">
📡 Step 1 : Sending HTTP Request 🌐
</h2>

<p style="
    font-size:18px;
    color:#555;
    margin-top:10px;
    font-family:Calibri;">
📥 Connect to <b>Collegedunia.com</b> using the <b>Requests</b> library and retrieve the webpage for scraping.
</p>

</div>

</div>
"""))

🏫 Website Name : 🌐 Collegedunia.com

📡 Step 1 : Sending HTTP Request 🌐

📥 Connect to Collegedunia.com using the Requests library and retrieve the webpage for scraping.

In [5]:
import requests
In [6]:
url = "https://collegedunia.com"
headers={ "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0(Windows NT 10.0; Win64 ; x64) appleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML ,Like Gecko Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36"}
response = requests.get(url , headers = headers)
In [7]:
response.status_code
Out[7]:
200

📄 Step 2 : Extract HTML Content  🌐

⚙️ Extract the raw text data/HTML source code from the website's response.

In [8]:
html_code = response.text
#html_code

🔍 Step 3 : Parsing the HTML  🌐

🥣 Parse the raw HTML code using BeautifulSoup to structure it into a readable tree format.

In [9]:
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import pandas as pd
In [10]:
soup = BeautifulSoup(html_code, "html.parser")
soup
Out[10]:

solid rgba(0,0,0,0.125);border-radius:0.25rem;}.card--hover:hover{box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.117647),0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.117647);}.card>hr{margin-right:0;margin-left:0;}.card>.list-group:first-child .list-group-item:first-child{border-top-left-radius:0.25rem;border-top-right-radius:0.25rem;}.card>.list-group:last-child .list-group-item:last-child{border-bottom-right-radius:0.25rem;border-bottom-left-radius:0.25rem;}.card-body{-webkit-flex:1 1 auto;-ms-flex:1 1 auto;flex:1 1 auto;min-height:1px;padding:0.5rem;}@media (min-width:1200px){.card-body{padding:1.25rem;}}#nprogress{pointer-events:none;}#nprogress .bar{background:#ff7900;position:fixed;z-index:1035;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:2px;}#nprogress .peg{display:block;position:absolute;right:0px;width:100px;height:100%;box-shadow:0 0 10px #ff7900,0 0 5px #ff7900;opacity:1;-webkit-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);-ms-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);-webkit-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);-ms-transform:rotate(3deg) translate(0px,-4px);transform:rotate(3deg) (min-width:576px) and (max-width:991.98px){.m-only{display:none;}.d-only{display:block;}}@media (min-width:576px){.section-heading{font-size:1rem;}}.overflow-x-hidden{overflow-x:hidden;}.overflow-hidden{overflow:hidden;}.overflow-x-auto{overflow-x:auto;}.object-fit-contain{object-fit:contain;}.object-fit-cover{object-fit:cover;}.text-default{color:#333;}.mb-0{margin-bottom:0 Collections"},{"type":"notification","data":{},"title":"Latest Notification","liveNotification":[{"title":"CLAT 2027 Notification Live: CLAT 2027 Notification PDF Releasing Soon","description":"\u003cul\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003eStudents who are seeking admission to NLUs across India and other participating institutes will soon be able to check the CLAT 2027 exam date, registration dates and schedule in the notification pdf soon.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe CLAT 2027 notification PDF will be released at consortiumofnlus.ac.in.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n","date":"2026-07-01T13:41","url":"news/clat-2027-notification-soon-check-live-updates-alertid-175880"},{"title":"Class 10 Second Board Result 2026 Live Update: Internal Assessment marks conducted only once, carried forward to both phases","description":"\u003cul\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003eTo maintain consistency across the two-exam structure, Internal Assessment marks, covering practicals, projects, and assignments, were conducted only once during the academic session.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003eThese marks, worth 20 out of 100 in most subjects, are carried forward and applied uniformly to both the Phase 1 and Phase 2 results when the final marksheet is compiled.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n","date":"2026-06-30T18:25","url":"news/cbse-10th-result-2026-phase-2-live-updates-alertid-155589"},{"title":"Re-NEET UG 2026 Answer Key LIVE:  ReNEET UG who took the NEET Exam and thanking the team for whom the exam was possible.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/p\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv style=\"text-align:center\"\u003e\u003cimg alt=\"NEET Re Exam 2026 Notice\" Result 2026 Live Updates:  AP EAPCET Result soon","description":"\u003cp\u003eAPSCHE will release\u0026nbsp;the \u003cstrong\u003eAP EAPCET result soon on its official website\u003c/strong\u003e. href=\"https://cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/APSCHE/APSCHEHome.aspx\" rel=\"nofollow\" target=\"_blank\"\u003ecets.apsche.ap.gov.in\u003c/a\u003e.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/p\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv Khandwala College Fifth Merit List 2026 Out","description":"\u003cp\u003eNagindas Khandwala College Fifth Merit List 2026 has been released. The highest cutoff percentage is for\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eB.Sc Interior Design\u003c/strong\u003e\u0026nbsp;at\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e46.83%\u003c/strong\u003e, followed by\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e45.67%\u003c/strong\u003e\u0026nbsp;for\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eB.Com Digital Business\u003c/strong\u003e,\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e44.3%\u0026nbsp;\u003c/strong\u003efor\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eBSM\u003c/strong\u003e, and\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e40%\u0026nbsp;\u003c/strong\u003efor\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eB.Com BA\u003c/strong\u003e. \u003ca href=\"https://www.nkc.ac.in/DisplayPage.aspx?page=eckko\" rel=\"nofollow\" target=\"_blank\"\u003eDownload Fifth Merit List\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\n","date":"2026-06-16T20:00","url":"news/mumbai-university-fifth-ug-merit-list-2026-live-updates-alertid-160341"},{"title":"ReNEET 2026 Live Updates: NTA Warns Students Against Telegram Paper Leak Scams","description":"\u003cul\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli data-end=\"229\" data-section-id=\"r3plxy\" data-start=\"84\"\u003eNTA has issued a strong advisory warning candidates and parents about fake Telegram channels claiming to offer the Re-NEET 2026 question paper.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli data-end=\"418\" data-section-id=\"1ff1lrc\" data-start=\"230\"\u003eAccording to NTA, fraudsters are demanding anywhere between \u003cstrong data-end=\"315\" data-start=\"292\"\u003e\u0026#8377;14,000 and \u0026#8377;25,000\u003c/strong\u003e, while some are reportedly asking for \u003cstrong data-end=\"381\" data-start=\"354\"\u003eseveral lakhs of rupees\u003c/strong\u003e, promising access to the exam paper.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli data-end=\"544\" data-section-id=\"ybxopt\" data-start=\"419\"\u003eThe agency has reiterated that \u003cstrong data-end=\"497\" data-start=\"452\"\u003ethere is no leaked paper for Re-NEET 2026\u003c/strong\u003e and candidates should not fall for such scams.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003c/ul\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cp\u003e\u003cimg alt=\"\" height=\"585\" src=\"\" srcset=\"\" style=\"float:none\" width=\"600\" data-src=\"https://image-static.collegedunia.com/public/image/Screenshot_2026_06_16_173632_b6237a9a1e85c7dd520ae5235d40c5bd.png?tr=w-600,h-585,c-force\" class=\"clgdn_lazyload\"\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cp\u003eSource: \u003ca href=\"https://x.com/NTA_Exams/status/2066851719468687612\" rel=\"nofollow\" target=\"_blank\"\u003eNEET NTA X Post\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n","date":"2026-06-16T17:37","url":"news/reneet-admit-card-release-live-updates-alertid-155832"}]},{"type":"top-colleges","data":{"college_data":[{"basic_info":{"college_id":"25455","college_name":"IIT Lovely Professional University(LPU). I got confirmed admisison from all of them. I choose this university cause of the low fees and it is near to the place where I live. I appeared for the JEE exams, and due to my low score was not able to make it through in any of the Tier-1 colleges, The admission process is really easy, Appear for the CUCET examination and you get scholarship based on your score, qualifying criteria is 60% in boards examination. If you have high scores in JEE, CUET-UG, or Board examinations you get direct admission in the Chandigarh","state":"Chandigarh","state_id":"36","city_id":"105","college_city":"Chandigarh","logo":"public/college_data/images/logos/1715079781Screenshotfrom20240507163242.png","cover":"public/college_data/images/appImage/10842_MEDICAL_NEW.jpg","approvals":["INC","MCI","UGC"],"major_stream_rating":"9.9952","rating":"10.0","fees":[{"short_form":"B.Sc (Nursing)","name":"B.Sc (Nursing)","link":"bachelor-of-science-bsc-nursing-2993","fee":7305,"fee_formatted":"7,305","type":"Total Fees","course_id":"11"}],"reviewsData":{"student":"Pooja","studentStatus":null,"avgRating":3.9,"defaultDesc":"I had appeared for neet. But as a average student i couldn't make it to be a doctor insted i cracked pgi chandigarh nsc nursing entrance. \nPgi chandigarh is very affordable. \nIt provide job as bond is signed during admission, hostel is provided, everything is very affordable here, we have to pay for uniform and that is one time investment. \n\nPgi conduct exam for admission. \nPgi chandigarh bsc nursing entrance is the name of exam, it's basically conducted in month of june or july and it is conducted in 4-5 state of north india, it is for females only. \nMerit list will ne released after the result and student who get their name in list can apply for counseling. \nCurrently there are 89 seats in bsc nursing for 2024 but from 2025 seats will be increased and they will be 128 . \nExam is of moderate level. \nIt comprises of biology 20 question. \nPhysics 20 question. \nChemistry 20 question. \nEnglish 20 question. \nNursing aptitude 20 question. \nPaper is conducted in online mode\nExam is of 2 hours and 100 questions will be there and +1 for a correct answer and -0. 25 for a wrong answer. \nEligibility-\nAge -17\nEducation- 12th (50% marks required) \nExam is conducted in many languages. \nAll the best for exam. Indian Institute of Management","college_short_form":"IIM Bangalore","state":"Karnataka","state_id":"17","city_id":"227","college_city":"Bangalore","logo":"public/college_data/images/logos/col30730.png","cover":"public/college_data/images/appImage/25602_IIMB_New.jpg","approvals":["AICTE","UGC"],"major_stream_rating":"9.9952","rating":"10.0","fees":[{"short_form":"PGP Business Analytics","name":"PGP Business Analytics","link":"post-graduate-programme-in-business-analytics-9750","fee":2630000,"fee_formatted":"26.3 Lakhs","type":"Total Fees","course_id":"120"}],"reviewsData":{"student":"MANYATA KUMAR","studentStatus":null,"avgRating":4.6,"defaultDesc":"The other college that I applied was for Shaheed Sukhdev College of business studies in Delhi University and I didn't get admission in that as i didn't had enough marks but I also applied for BMS course in so many Delhi University colleges but I choose this course and this college over other because this course BBA dbe is a new course and it really helps in everything that we need for our future jobs like everything in the market that is need like excel and web development and starting a venture so everything in this course really fascinates me as it is new and it will provide us so many new opportunities as this is a new batch and the Delhi University ones the course didn't really excite me that much. I did get rejected from the other college which was only one college Sukhdev College of business studies and I didn't make it there because the cutoff was very high and I got marks of 710 out of 1000 and to get into the college we have to get 760 + according to this year cut off so that's why I didn't got into that and that went wrong I didn't get admission because of some marks and admission process of our college is very simple we have to do registration and after the registration we have to pay 3000 rupees and we have a entrance test also but we can also get admission on the basis of CUET marks of this year or previous years and one basis of JEE marks from this year or previous years and and the eligibility of the entrance exam is 50% for our exam entrance exam is of 60 marks and we have to get minimum of 50% to pass this course and to get into this course but for SC ST candidate it is 40% passing criteria and the entrance exam is what is preferred by the most of the student because they don't know the cutoff for cuet and jee and they prefer entrance exam on that and after that have to pass the Indian Institute of Technology - [IITM]","college_short_form":"IIT Madras","state":"Tamil Nadu","state_id":"31","city_id":"471","college_city":"Chennai","logo":"public/college_data/images/logos/1434977143jpjpjpjpj.jpg","cover":"public/college_data/images/appImage/1509430807cover.jpg","approvals":["AICTE","MHRD"],"major_stream_rating":"9.9952","rating":"10.0","fees":[{"short_form":"BS Data Science and Applications","name":"BS Data Science and Applications","link":"bachelor-of-science-bs-data-science-and-applications-27546","fee":939608,"fee_formatted":"9.4 Lakhs","type":"Total Fees","course_id":"212"}],"reviewsData":{"student":"Sujal Kumar","studentStatus":null,"avgRating":4.3,"defaultDesc":"Applied to KIIT and even got confirmed admission, but chose IIT Madras BS (Data Science \u0026 Applications) because it felt more credible and future-proof. The IIT tag carries strong trust, and the program is built in a way that pushes real skill-building through structured learning, not just attendance.\r\n\r\nAnother big reason was career support. IITM BS has focused internship and placement opportunities through its ecosystem, and that mattered more than just “getting a seat”. Also, the term-wise course registration is a real advantage—workload can be planned, so it stays manageable alongside internships, freelance work, or a side hustle.\r\n\r\nThere wasn’t a rejection story here—KIIT was confirmed. The decision was mainly about fit: IITM BS felt higher demand, more authentic, and more flexible without compromising rigor.\r\n\r\nAdmission experience: there is no GD or interview. Admission mainly happens through the Qualifier route (4 weeks of coursework + an in-person qualifier exam), and some students enter through JEE Main direct entry. Cutoffs vary by category and term, so it’s best to check the latest official criteria for the exact   <script>
   window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
                function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}

  <script>
   var isTwa = 0;
                var twaParamExist = window.location.href.indexOf('is_twa') > -1 ? true : false;
                if(twaParamExist){
                    sessionStorage.setItem('isTwa',1);
                    isTwa = 1;
                }else if(sessionStorage.getItem('isTwa')){
                    isTwa = 1;
                }
  </script>
  <script>
   const GAID = 'UA-51322859-1';
                  // const OPTIMIZE_ID = 'GTM-N47J54N';
                  // gtag('config', GAID, { 'optimize_id': OPTIMIZE_ID });
                  gtag('event', 'optimize.callback', {
                    callback: (variant_id, experiment_id) => {
                      if (variant_id)
                      console.info('Experiment with ID: %c' + experiment_id + '%c is on variant: %c' + variant_id, 'color:blue', 'color:initial', 'color:blue');
                    }
                  });
                  function activateOptimize () {
                    setTimeout(() => {
                      window.dataLayer.push({'event': 'optimize.activate'});
                    }, 100)
                  }
  </script>

  <style id="__jsx-1264141291">
   .chapter-card,.pdf-download-section{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;gap:20px;padding:12px 13px 12px 18px;margin-block:10px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e7eaf0;border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(18,28,45,0.04);-webkit-transition:box-shadow 0.18s,border-color 0.18s;transition:box-shadow 0.18s,border-color 0.18s;}.chapter-card:hover,.pdf-download-section:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(18,28,45,0.08);border-color:#dde1e9;-webkit-transform:translateY(-1px);-ms-transform:translateY(-1px);transform:translateY(-1px);}.chapter-card .title,.pdf-download-section>h4,.content-section .pdf-download-section>h4{-webkit-flex:1;-ms-flex:1;flex:1;min-width:0;margin:0;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.35;color:#1b2230;}.chapter-card .btns,.pdf-download-section .btns-wrapper{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;gap:8px;-webkit-flex-shrink:0;-ms-flex-negative:0;flex-shrink:0;}.chapter-card .pdf-card,.pdf-download-section .btns-wrapper>.btn{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 14px 8px 11px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #dde1e9;border-radius:11px;cursor:pointer;-webkit-transition:background 0.15s,border-color 0.15s;transition:background 0.15s,border-color 0.15s;}.chapter-card .icon,.pdf-download-section .btn-icon{display:block;width:19px;height:auto;-webkit-flex-shrink:0;-ms-flex-negative:0;flex-shrink:0;}.chapter-card .icon>svg,.chapter-card .icon>img,.pdf-download-section .btn-icon>svg,.pdf-download-section .btn-icon>img{display:block;width:100%;height:auto;}.chapter-card .label,.pdf-download-section .label{margin:0;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;color:#5a6678;-webkit-transition:color 0.15s;transition:color 0.15s;}.chapter-card .a-pdf:hover,.pdf-download-section .download-pdf:hover{background:#fef2f2;border-color:#f8d6d6;}.chapter-card .a-pdf:hover .label,.pdf-download-section .download-pdf:hover .label{color:#dd2025;}.chapter-card .a-hd:hover,.pdf-download-section .hd-pdf:hover{background:#eff5ff;border-color:#cfe0fd;}.chapter-card .a-hd:hover .label,.pdf-download-section .hd-pdf:hover .label{color:#2563eb;}.chapter-card .a-note:hover,.pdf-download-section .handwritten-pdf:hover{background:#eefcf3;border-color:#c8ecd4;}.chapter-card .a-note:hover .label,.pdf-download-section .handwritten-pdf:hover .label{color:#16a34a;}@media (max-width:560px){.chapter-card,.pdf-download-section{-webkit-flex-direction:column;-ms-flex-direction:column;flex-direction:column;-webkit-align-items:stretch;-webkit-box-align:stretch;-ms-flex-align:stretch;align-items:stretch;gap:10px;padding:14px;}.chapter-card .btns,.pdf-download-section .btns-wrapper{width:100%;display:grid;grid-auto-flow:column;grid-auto-columns:1fr;}.chapter-card .pdf-card,.pdf-download-section .btns-wrapper>.btn{-webkit-box-pack:center;-webkit-justify-content:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;justify-content:center;padding:9px 8px;}.chapter-card .label,.pdf-download-section .label{font-size:12px;}}
  </style>

   {;}@media (max-width:768px){.download-pdf{border:1px solid #ef6820;border-radius:8px;}}
  </style>
  <style id="__jsx-894347735">
   .gallery-slider-container .image-container{position:relative;background:#f5fcff;padding:20px 24px;white-space:nowrap;}@media (max-width:991.98px){.gallery-slider-container .image-container{padding:20px 0px;}}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .slides-container{max-width:90%;margin:0 auto;position:relative;}@media (max-width:991.98px){.gallery-slider-container .image-container .slides-container{width:100%;}}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .slides{display:none;width:100%;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .slides img{height:400px;width:100%;}@media (max-width:991.98px){.gallery-slider-container .image-container .slides img{width:100%;height:162px !important;}}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .slides:first-child{display:block;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .slides .slide-image{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;margin:auto;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .cursor{cursor:pointer;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide{cursor:pointer;position:absolute;top:50%;width:25px;height:25px;border-radius:50%;color:#000;display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;margin-left:20px;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;-webkit-box-pack:center;-webkit-justify-content:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;justify-content:center;background:#fff;font-weight:bold;font-size:15px;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide::before,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide::before{width:0.4em;height:0.4em;border-right:2px solid #000;border-top:2px solid #000;-webkit-transform:rotate(225deg);-ms-transform:rotate(225deg);transform:rotate(225deg);content:"";}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide:hover,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide:hover{-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none;}@media (max-width:991.98px){.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide{top:45%;}}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide{right:20px;margin-left:0px;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide::before{width:0.4em;height:0.4em;border-right:2px solid #000;border-top:2px solid #000;-webkit-transform:rotate(45deg);-ms-transform:rotate(45deg);transform:rotate(45deg);content:"";}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide:hover,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide:hover{background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);color:#fff;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide:hover::before,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide:hover::before{border-right:2px solid #fff;border-top:2px solid #fff;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide:focus,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide:focus{background:#fff;color:#000;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .prev-slide:focus::before,.gallery-slider-container .image-container .next-slide:focus::before{border-right:2px solid #fff;border-top:2px solid #fff;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .image-thumbnail-container{border-top:1px solid #e8e8e8;padding-top:16px;margin-top:20px;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .image-thumbnail-container .img-container{display:inline-block;margin-right:16px;width:228px;height:129px;cursor:pointer;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .image-thumbnail-container .img-container img{width:228px;height:129px;}.gallery-slider-container .image-container .gallery-count{position:absolute;font-size:16px;font-weight:500;line-height:19.86px;color:#fff;background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);padding:8px 12px;border-radius:4px;right:0px;bottom:0px;margin-right:28px;margin-bottom:24px;}.article-slider-container{background-color:#f5fcff;border-radius:8px;}.article-slider-container .img-container img{max-width:-webkit-fit-content !important;max-width:-moz-fit-content !important;max-width:fit-content !important;}@media (max-width:991.98px){.article-slider-container .img-container img{width:302px !important;height:302px !important;}}
  </style>

dotted;cursor:help;border-bottom:0;-webkit-text-decoration-skip-ink:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;}address{margin-bottom:1rem;font-style:normal;line-height:inherit;}ol,ul,dl{margin-top:0;margin-bottom:1rem;}ol ol,ul ul,ol ul,ul ol{margin-bottom:0;}dt{font-weight:700;}dd{margin-bottom:0.5rem;margin-left:0;}blockquote{margin:0 0 1rem;padding:10px;background:rgba(246,245,245,0.7490196078);border-left:3px solid #ff7900;border-radius:4px;}b,strong{font-weight:900;}small{font-size:80%;}sub,sup{position:relative;font-size:75%;line-height:0;vertical-align:baseline;}sub{bottom:-0.25em;}sup{top:-0.5em;}a{color:#ff7900;-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none;background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0);}a:not([href]){color:inherit;-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none;}a:not([href]):hover{color:inherit;-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none;}pre,code,kbd,samp{font-family:SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Monaco,Consolas,"Liberation Mono","Courier New",monospace;font-size:1em;}pre{margin-top:0;margin-bottom:1rem;overflow:auto;}figure{margin:0 0 1rem;}img{vertical-align:middle;border-style:none;}svg{overflow:hidden;vertical-align:middle;}table{border-collapse:collapse;}caption{padding-top:0.75rem;padding-bottom:0.75rem;color:#666;text-align:left;caption-side:bottom;}th{text-align:inherit;}label{display:inline-block;margin-bottom:0.5rem;}button{border-radius:0;}button:focus{outline:1px dotted;outline:5px auto -webkit-focus-ring-color;}input,button,select,optgroup,textarea{margin:0;font-family:inherit;font-size:inherit;line-height:inherit;}button,input{overflow:visible;}button,select{text-transform:none;}select{word-wrap:normal;}button,[type=button],[type=reset],[type=submit]{-webkit-appearance:button;}button:not(:disabled),[type=button]:not(:disabled),[type=reset]:not(:disabled),[type=submit]:not(:disabled){cursor:pointer;}button::-moz-focus-inner,[type=button]::-moz-focus-inner,[type=reset]::-moz-focus-inner,[type=submit]::-moz-focus-inner{padding:0;border-style:none;}input[type=radio],input[type=checkbox]{box-sizing:border-box;padding:0;}input[type=date],input[type=time],input[type=datetime-local],input[type=month]{-webkit-appearance:listbox;}textarea{overflow:auto;resize:vertical;}fieldset{min-width:0;padding:0;margin:0;border:0;}legend{display:block;width:100%;max-width:100%;padding:0;margin-bottom:0.5rem;font-size:1.5rem;line-height:inherit;color:inherit;white-space:normal;}progress{vertical-align:baseline;}[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button{height:auto;}[type=search]{outline-offset:-2px;-webkit-appearance:none;}[type=search]::-webkit-search-decoration{-webkit-appearance:none;}::-webkit-file-upload-button{font:inherit;-webkit-appearance:button;}output{display:inline-block;}summary{display:list-item;cursor:pointer;}template{display:none;}[hidden]{display:none;}[class*=col-].m-0,input.m-0{margin:0;}[class*=col-].mt-0,input.mt-0,[class*=col-].my-0,input.my-0{margin-top:0;}[class*=col-].mr-0,input.mr-0,[class*=col-].mx-0,input.mx-0{margin-right:0;}[class*=col-].mb-0,input.mb-0,[class*=col-].my-0,input.my-0{margin-bottom:0;}[class*=col-].ml-0,input.ml-0,[class*=col-].mx-0,input.mx-0{margin-left:0;}[class*=col-].m-1,input.m-1{margin:0.25rem;}[class*=col-].mt-1,input.mt-1,[class*=col-].my-1,input.my-1{margin-top:0.25rem;}[class*=col-].mr-1,input.mr-1,[class*=col-].mx-1,input.mx-1{margin-right:0.25rem;}[class*=col-].mb-1,input. a{-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none;margin:0 auto .live-form-heading--icon{height:30px;width:30px;margin-right:10px;}.live_form_container .live-form-heading--icon svg{height:100%;width:100%;}.live_form_container .ads_body_live_form_container{cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:15px;}.live_form_container .ads_body_live_form_container:last-child{margin-bottom:0px;}.live_form_container .ads_body_live_form_container:hover .ads_apply_btn{background:#ff7900;color:#fff;-webkit-transition:0.5s ease all;transition:0.5s ease all;}.live_form_container a{max-width:100%;padding:10px .ads_college_data{text-align:left;}.bodyslot-new{background:#f5f8f9;padding-bottom:16px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:10px;}.bodyslot-new [class^=ads_],.bodyslot-new [class^=ads_] h2{color:#000;font-size:20px !important;font-weight:700;line-height:28px !important;margin-bottom:0;display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;-webkit-box-pack:justify;-webkit-justify-content:space-between;-ms-flex-pack:justify;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;}.live-form-container-new a{max-width:100%;}.live-form-container-new a:hover{-webkit-text-decoration:none !important;text-decoration:none    </div>
   <header class="jsx-4281398864 jsx-637017680 position-relative header-main-container">
    <div class="jsx-4281398864 jsx-637017680 header-wrapper top-0 left-0 w-100">
     <div class="jsx-4281398864 jsx-637017680 cd-header-primary d-flex align-items-center">
      <div class="jsx-4281398864 jsx-637017680 container-fluid cd-new-header p-0 cd-header-absolute">
       <div class="jsx-48541470 header_wrapper bg-secondary-new dark-header text-white position-relative">
        <div class="jsx-48541470 d-flex align-items-center">
         <div class="jsx-48541470 d-flex cd-logo pointer">
          <a class="jsx-48541470 cd-logo-link pointer-none" data-college_section_name="header" data-csm-title="collegedunia.com" data-csm-track="true" data-event-type="link_click" data-section_name="menu" href="/">
           <img alt="cd_logo" class="jsx-4205729962 cd-logo-new" decoding="sync" fetchpriority="high" src="https://image-static.collegedunia.com/public/images/cd_logo_white_new.png"/>
          </a>
         </div>
         <span class="jsx-48541470 header-line pr-4 my-5">
         </span>
         <div class="jsx-48541470 goal-container ml-4">
          <div class="goal-heading d-flex f-12 font-weight-medium text-primary line-height-15 no-break">
           <div class="d-flex">
            <span class="icon header-sprite school-goal-icon goal-icon mright-2">
            </span>
            <span class="no-break">
             Select Goal &amp;
            </span>
           </div>
           <div class="d-flex">
            <span class="icon header-sprite city-goal-icon goal-icon mright-2">
            </span>
            <span>
             City
            </span>
           </div>
          </div>
          <div class="text-white selected-goal-name-ind mtop-2 d-flex align-items-center f-14 font-weight-medium line-height-23 pointer" data-college_section_name="header" data-csm-title="Goal: Select Goal " data-csm-track="true" data-event-type="link_click" data-section_name="menu" id="js-select-goal-container">
           <span class="no-break">
            Select Goal
           </span>
           <span class="icon header-sprite arrow-down-white-20 ml-1 dark-icon">
           </span>
          </div>
         </div>
         <div class="jsx-48541470 ml-4 w-100">
          <button class="w-100 border-none header-search light-hover text-little-gray d-flex align-items-center" data-college_section_name="header" data-csm-track="true" data-event-type="link_click" id="js-desktop-header-search-toggle-btn" type="button">
           <span class="icon header-sprite search-icon">
           </span>
           <span class="search-cl f-14 font-weight-medium line-height-20 ml-1">
            Search for Colleges, Exams, Courses and More..
           </span>

       </h2>

     <section class="jsx-2069321990 section-control mb-0 section-control-topgap">
      <div class="jsx-2069321990 container">
       <h2 class="jsx-2069321990 heading font-weight-bold">
        Admission 2026
       </h2>
       <div class="jsx-2069321990 d-flex pills">
        <div class="jsx-2069321990 pills-item">
         <a class="jsx-2069321990 pill" data-csm-title="B Ed Admission 2025" data-csm-track="true" data-event-type="link_click" data-ga-href="courses/bachelor-of-education-bed/bed-admission-2025" data-ga-module="homepage" data-ga-section="Admission 2026" data-ga-title="B Ed Admission 2025" data-ga-track="true" data-section_name="Admission 2026" href="/courses/bachelor-of-education-bed/bed-admission-2025">
          B Ed Admission 2025
          <svg class="ml-2 mt-1" fill="none" height="20" style="width:23px;height:23px;fill:#333" viewbox="0 0 23 23" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
           <path d="M2 10c0-4.41 3.59-8 8-8s8 3.59 8 8-3.59 8-8 8-8-3.59-8-8zm-2 0c0 5.52 4.48 10 10 10s10-4.48 10-10S15.52 0 10 0 0 4.48 0 10zm10-1H6v2h4v3l4-4-4-4v3z">
           </path>
          </svg>
         </a>
        </div>
        <div class="jsx-2069321990 pills-item">
         <a class="jsx-2069321990 pill" data-csm-title="MBA Admission 2025" data-csm-track="true" data-event-type="link_click" data-ga-href="courses/master-of-business-administration-mba/mba-admission-2025" data-ga-module="homepage" data-ga-section="Admission 2026" data-ga-title="MBA Admission 2025" data-ga-track="true" data-section_name="Admission 2026" href="/courses/master-of-business-administration-mba/mba-admission-2025">
          MBA Admission 2025
          <svg class="ml-2 mt-1" fill="none" height="20" style="width:23px;height:23px;fill:#333" viewbox="0 0 23 23" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
           <path d="M2 10c0-4.41 3.59-8 8-8s8 3.59 8 8-3.59 8-8 8-8-3.59-8-8zm-2 0c0 5.52 4.48 10 10 10s10-4.48 10-10S15.52 0 10 0 0 4.48 0 10zm10-1H6v2h4v3l4-4-4-4v3z">
           </path>
          </svg>
         </a>

                 </path>
                </svg>
               </a>
              </div>
             </div>
            </div>
           </div>
          </div>
         </div>
        </div>

      </div>
     </section>
    </div>

   <section class="jsx-797483012 section-control-topgap section-control section-control-noborder mb-0">
    <div class="jsx-797483012 container text-center">
     <h2 class="jsx-797483012 heading font-weight-bold text-capitalize mb-0">
      Subscribe to our news letter
     </h2>
     <p class="jsx-797483012 mb-lg-32 color-gray-600">
      Get College Notifications, Exam Notifications and News Updates
     </p>
     <div class="jsx-797483012 d-flex justify-content-center">
      <div class="jsx-797483012">
       <form class="jsx-797483012 row mx-n2 footer-form">
        <div class="jsx-797483012 px-2">
         <div>
          <input class="input-style email" name="email" placeholder="Enter your email id" step="" type="email" value=""/>
          <div class="invalid-feedback d-none">
          </div>
         </div>
        </div>
        <div class="jsx-797483012 px-2">
         <div class="footer-form">
          <input class="input-style phone" maxlength="10" name="mobileno" placeholder="Enter your mobile no" step="" type="text" value=""/>
          <div class="invalid-feedback d-none">
          </div>
         </div>
        </div>
        <div class="jsx-797483012 px-2">
         <div class="">
          <label for="course_tag">
          </label>
          <select aria-label="course_tag" class="input-style select-style" id="course_tag" name="course_tag">
           <option disabled="" selected="" value="">
            Choose your course
           </option>
          </select>
          <div class="invalid-feedback d-none">
          </div>
         </div>
        </div>
        <div class="jsx-797483012 px-2">
         <button class="jsx-797483012 submit-btn" type="submit">
          Submit
         </button>
        </div>
       </form>
      </div>
     </div>
    </div>
   </section>

Collections"},{"type":"notification","data":{},"title":"Latest Notification","liveNotification":[{"title":"CLAT 2027 Notification Live: CLAT 2027 Notification PDF Releasing Soon","description":"\u003cul\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003eStudents who are seeking admission to NLUs across India and other participating institutes will soon be able to check the CLAT 2027 exam date, registration dates and schedule in the notification pdf soon.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe CLAT 2027 notification PDF will be released at consortiumofnlus.ac.in.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n","date":"2026-07-01T13:41","url":"news/clat-2027-notification-soon-check-live-updates-alertid-175880"},{"title":"Class 10 Second Board Result 2026 Live Update: Internal Assessment marks conducted only once, carried forward to both phases","description":"\u003cul\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003eTo maintain consistency across the two-exam structure, Internal Assessment marks, covering practicals, projects, and assignments, were conducted only once during the academic session.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli\u003eThese marks, worth 20 out of 100 in most subjects, are carried forward and applied uniformly to both the Phase 1 and Phase 2 results when the final marksheet is compiled.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n","date":"2026-06-30T18:25","url":"news/cbse-10th-result-2026-phase-2-live-updates-alertid-155589"},{"title":"Re-NEET UG 2026 Answer Key LIVE:  ReNEET UG 2026 Cutoff Rank for AIIMS MBBS: Category-Wise","description":"\u003cdiv class=\"table-responsive\"\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\r\n\t\u003cthead\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003cth\u003eAIIMS Colleges in India\u003c/th\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003cth\u003eGeneral Rank Cutoff\u003c/th\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003cth\u003eExpected Marks Required (General)\u003c/th\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\u003c/thead\u003e\r\n\t\u003ctbody\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e\u003ca Result 2026 Live Updates:  AP EAPCET Result soon","description":"\u003cp\u003eAPSCHE will release\u0026nbsp;the \u003cstrong\u003eAP EAPCET result soon on its official website\u003c/strong\u003e. Once released, candidates will be able to download their scorecard using their registration number and date of birth from the official website,\u0026nbsp;\u003ca href=\"https://cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/APSCHE/APSCHEHome.aspx\" rel=\"nofollow\" target=\"_blank\"\u003ecets.apsche.ap.gov.in\u003c/a\u003e.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/p\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv Mondal\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e3\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eUmang Bhoot\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e4\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eRahul Konar\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e5\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eSravan Bhattacharya\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e6\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eArha Bhattacharya\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e7\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eSrijan Sur\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e8\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eManish Senapati\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e9\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eSabyasachi Rakshar\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003ctr\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003e10\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\t\u003ctd\u003eDebojit Paul\u003c/td\u003e\r\n\t\t\u003c/tr\u003e\r\n\t\u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n","date":"2026-06-18T21:06","url":"news/wbjee-2026-result-live-download-rank-card-at-wbjeeb-nic-in-alertid-163120"},{"title":"Nagindas Khandwala College Fifth Merit List 2026 Out","description":"\u003cp\u003eNagindas Khandwala College Fifth Merit List 2026 has been released. The highest cutoff percentage is for\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eB.Sc Interior Design\u003c/strong\u003e\u0026nbsp;at\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e46.83%\u003c/strong\u003e, followed by\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e45.67%\u003c/strong\u003e\u0026nbsp;for\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eB.Com Digital Business\u003c/strong\u003e,\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e44.3%\u0026nbsp;\u003c/strong\u003efor\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eBSM\u003c/strong\u003e, and\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003e40%\u0026nbsp;\u003c/strong\u003efor\u0026nbsp;\u003cstrong\u003eB.Com BA\u003c/strong\u003e. \u003ca href=\"https://www.nkc.ac.in/DisplayPage.aspx?page=eckko\" rel=\"nofollow\" target=\"_blank\"\u003eDownload Fifth Merit List\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\n","date":"2026-06-16T20:00","url":"news/mumbai-university-fifth-ug-merit-list-2026-live-updates-alertid-160341"},{"title":"ReNEET 2026 Live Updates: NTA Warns Students Against Telegram Paper Leak Scams","description":"\u003cul\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli data-end=\"229\" data-section-id=\"r3plxy\" data-start=\"84\"\u003eNTA has issued a strong advisory warning candidates and parents about fake Telegram channels claiming to offer the Re-NEET 2026 question paper.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli data-end=\"418\" data-section-id=\"1ff1lrc\" data-start=\"230\"\u003eAccording to NTA, fraudsters are demanding anywhere between \u003cstrong data-end=\"315\" data-start=\"292\"\u003e\u0026#8377;14,000 and \u0026#8377;25,000\u003c/strong\u003e, while some are reportedly asking for \u003cstrong data-end=\"381\" data-start=\"354\"\u003eseveral lakhs of rupees\u003c/strong\u003e, promising access to the exam paper.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\t\u003cli data-end=\"544\" data-section-id=\"ybxopt\" data-start=\"419\"\u003eThe agency has reiterated that \u003cstrong data-end=\"497\" data-start=\"452\"\u003ethere is no leaked paper for Re-NEET 2026\u003c/strong\u003e and candidates should not fall for such scams.\u003c/li\u003e\r\n\u003c/ul\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cp\u003e\u003cimg alt=\"\" height=\"585\" src=\"\" srcset=\"\" style=\"float:none\" width=\"600\" data-src=\"https://image-static.collegedunia.com/public/image/Screenshot_2026_06_16_173632_b6237a9a1e85c7dd520ae5235d40c5bd.png?tr=w-600,h-585,c-force\" class=\"clgdn_lazyload\"\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cp\u003eSource: \u003ca href=\"https://x.com/NTA_Exams/status/2066851719468687612\" rel=\"nofollow\" target=\"_blank\"\u003eNEET NTA X Post\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n","date":"2026-06-16T17:37","url":"news/reneet-admit-card-release-live-updates-alertid-155832"}]},{"type":"top-colleges","data":{"college_data":[{"basic_info":{"college_id":"25455","college_name":"IIT I appeared for the JEE exams, and due to my low score was not able to make it through in any of the Tier-1 colleges, The admission process is really easy, Appear for the CUCET examination and you get scholarship based on your score, qualifying criteria is 60% in boards examination. If you have high scores in JEE, CUET-UG, or Board examinations you get direct admission in the Chandigarh","state":"Chandigarh","state_id":"36","city_id":"105","college_city":"Chandigarh","logo":"public/college_data/images/logos/1715079781Screenshotfrom20240507163242.png","cover":"public/college_data/images/appImage/10842_MEDICAL_NEW.jpg","approvals":["INC","MCI","UGC"],"major_stream_rating":"9.9952","rating":"10.0","fees":[{"short_form":"B.Sc (Nursing)","name":"B.Sc (Nursing)","link":"bachelor-of-science-bsc-nursing-2993","fee":7305,"fee_formatted":"7,305","type":"Total Fees","course_id":"11"}],"reviewsData":{"student":"Pooja","studentStatus":null,"avgRating":3.9,"defaultDesc":"I had appeared for neet. But as a average student i couldn't make it to be a doctor insted i cracked pgi chandigarh nsc nursing entrance. \nPgi chandigarh is very affordable. \nIt provide job as bond is signed during admission, hostel is provided, everything is very affordable here, we have to pay for uniform and that is one time investment. \n\nPgi conduct exam for admission. \nPgi chandigarh bsc nursing entrance is the name of exam, it's basically conducted in month of june or july and it is conducted in 4-5 state of north india, it is for females only. \nMerit list will ne released after the result and student who get their name in list can apply for counseling. \nCurrently there are 89 seats in bsc nursing for 2024 but from 2025 seats will be increased and they will be 128 . \nExam is of moderate level. \nIt comprises of biology 20 question. \nPhysics 20 question. \nChemistry 20 question. \nEnglish 20 question. \nNursing aptitude 20 question. \nPaper is conducted in online mode\nExam is of 2 hours and 100 questions will be there and +1 for a correct answer and -0. 25 for a wrong answer. \nEligibility-\nAge -17\nEducation- 12th (50% marks required) \nExam is conducted in many languages. \nAll the best for exam. Indian Institute of Management","college_short_form":"IIM Bangalore","state":"Karnataka","state_id":"17","city_id":"227","college_city":"Bangalore","logo":"public/college_data/images/logos/col30730.png","cover":"public/college_data/images/appImage/25602_IIMB_New.jpg","approvals":["AICTE","UGC"],"major_stream_rating":"9.9952","rating":"10.0","fees":[{"short_form":"PGP Business Analytics","name":"PGP Business Analytics","link":"post-graduate-programme-in-business-analytics-9750","fee":2630000,"fee_formatted":"26.3 Lakhs","type":"Total Fees","course_id":"120"}],"reviewsData":{"student":"MANYATA KUMAR","studentStatus":null,"avgRating":4.6,"defaultDesc":"The other college that I applied was for Shaheed Sukhdev College of business studies in Delhi University and I didn't get admission in that as i didn't had enough marks but I also applied for BMS course in so many Delhi University colleges but I choose this course and this college over other because this course BBA dbe is a new course and it really helps in everything that we need for our future jobs like everything in the market that is need like excel and web development and starting a venture so everything in this course really fascinates me as it is new and it will provide us so many new opportunities as this is a new batch and the Delhi University ones the course didn't really excite me that much. I did get rejected from the other college which was only one college Sukhdev College of business studies and I didn't make it there because the cutoff was very high and I got marks of 710 out of 1000 and to get into the college we have to get 760 + according to this year cut off so that's why I didn't got into that and that went wrong I didn't get admission because of some marks and admission process of our college is very simple we have to do registration and after the registration we have to pay 3000 rupees and we have a entrance test also but we can also get admission on the basis of CUET marks of this year or previous years and one basis of JEE marks from this year or previous years and and the eligibility of the entrance exam is 50% for our exam entrance exam is of 60 marks and we have to get minimum of 50% to pass this course and to get into this course but for SC ST candidate it is 40% passing criteria and the entrance exam is what is preferred by the most of the student because they don't know the cutoff for cuet and jee and they prefer entrance exam on that and after that have to pass the Nadu","state_id":"31","city_id":"471","college_city":"Chennai","logo":"public/college_data/images/logos/1434977143jpjpjpjpj.jpg","cover":"public/college_data/images/appImage/1509430807cover.jpg","approvals":["AICTE","MHRD"],"major_stream_rating":"9.9952","rating":"10.0","fees":[{"short_form":"BS Data Science and Applications","name":"BS Data Science and Applications","link":"bachelor-of-science-bs-data-science-and-applications-27546","fee":939608,"fee_formatted":"9.4 Lakhs","type":"Total Fees","course_id":"212"}],"reviewsData":{"student":"Sujal Kumar","studentStatus":null,"avgRating":4.3,"defaultDesc":"Applied to KIIT and even got confirmed admission, but chose IIT Madras BS (Data Science \u0026 Applications) because it felt more credible and future-proof. The IIT tag carries strong trust, and the program is built in a way that pushes real skill-building through structured learning, not just attendance.\r\n\r\nAnother big reason was career support. IITM BS has focused internship and placement opportunities through its ecosystem, and that mattered more than just “getting a seat”. Also, the term-wise course registration is a real advantage—workload can be planned, so it stays manageable alongside internships, freelance work, or a side hustle.\r\n\r\nThere wasn’t a rejection story here—KIIT was confirmed. The decision was mainly about fit: IITM BS felt higher demand, more authentic, and more flexible without compromising rigor.\r\n\r\nAdmission experience: there is no GD or interview. Admission mainly happens through the Qualifier route (4 weeks of coursework + an in-person qualifier exam), and some students enter through JEE Main direct entry. Cutoffs vary by category and term, so it’s best to check the latest official criteria for the exact In [34]:
information = []

for row in rows:
    cols = row.find_all('td')
    if len(cols) >= 3: 
        Rank = cols[0].get_text(strip=True) 
        college_name = cols[1].get_text(strip=True)
        ranking = cols[2].get_text(strip=True)
        
        information.append({
            "Rank": Rank,
            "College_Name": college_name,
            "Ranking": ranking
        })
In [35]:
df = pd.DataFrame(information)
